message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
actor "Administrator" as Admin
rectangle "SearchUsersByParamsRoute" as Route
rectangle "inDto : SearchUserDto" as InDto
rectangle "UsersController" as Controller
rectangle "SearchUsersByParamsService" as Service
rectangle "ISystemUserRepo" as ISystemUserRepo
rectangle "IUserProfileRepo" as IUserProfileRepo
rectangle "user : SystemUser" as User
rectangle "SystemUserMapper" as Mapper
rectangle "userDto : OutputUserDto" as UserDto
rectangle "usersjsn : ResponseEntity" as Response

note right of Admin
The parameters (name, email, profile and function) will be in the query of the request. At least, one of than must be typed or chosen.
end note

Admin -> Route: 1 GET /users?name=&email=&profile=&func=&func=
Route -> Controller: 2 searchUsersByTypedParams(inDto)
Controller -> Service: 3 searchUsersByTypedParams(inDto)

alt (if the request has a profile)
  Service -> IUserProfileRepo: 4 result : existByUserProfileId(profile)
end

alt (depending on which params came from inputDto, the service class will invoke the respective method)
  Service -> ISystemUserRepo: 5 findAllBy..()
  ISystemUserRepo -> Mapper: 6 create()
  Mapper -> usersFound : List<SystemUser>
  Service -> usersFoundDto : List<UserDto>
  Service -> Mapper: 8 create()
end

loop (for which user found at the list)
  Service -> User: 9 model2Dto(user)
  User -> Mapper: 10 create()
  Mapper -> UserDto : OutputUserDto
  Service -> UserDto: 11 userDto
  Service -> usersFoundDto: 12 addUserDto()
end

Service -> Response: 13 usersFoundDto
Response -> Admin: 14 create(usersFoundDto)
Admin -> Admin: 15 usersjsn
Admin -> Admin: 16 Show the list of user found by typed/chosen parameters

@enduml
